mapper.select: SELECT s.*, (SELECT sys09_apply_date FROM sys09_code WHERE sys09_code_kind_id = s.sys08_code_kind_id LIMIT 1) AS sys08_date FROM sys08_code_kind s ORDER BY s.sys08_kind_cd
SELECT * FROM sys08_code_kind WHERE sys08_sys_yn LIKE #{sysYn} AND (sys08_kind_nm LIKE #{kindName} OR LOWER(sys08_kind_cd) LIKE LOWER(#{kindName})) ORDER BY sys08_kind_cd
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys08_code_kind (sys08_kind_cd, sys08_kind_nm, sys08_sys_yn, sys08_note) VALUES (#{kindCode}, #{kindName}, #{sysYn}, #{note})
